entries.name: Moor's Hunger — the Heath is waking; the famished moor-troll it drove onto the Reach is the least of what's coming [§6 apex]
What was the Crossing — ~8 million New Yorkers torn across the realm in one black second — and is there a way home?
Are the drift-come demons? — the faiths will test you, and whose method wins (Codex ordeal vs Old Faith reading) decides if you burn
Who holds you, and on what terms — free / bound / owing (the four powers: oath / contract / enlistment / chains)
Whoever holds the strangers holds Cuthbert's vote — the Reach is Brackenford, the Coronation's wildcard
Find Akhil among the scattered drift-come — Shake's younger brother, somewhere in this flood of strangers
Re-arm — your pack, tools, armour and the road back to Samosa & Daegon lie lost in the mud of the Reach
FRONT: A wasting spreads — plague or curse rising from the broken Reach (Working-trace? mass death?), and it does not spare the drift-come [clock 0/6 regional]
FRONT: The dead don't lie still — the Crossing's bell woke restless spirits; the Reach's sealed Aureothan undercroft answers [clock 0/6 regional]
FRONT: The Red Captain rises — freed in the chaos, a lone apex working the roads for the scattered drift-come [clock 0/6 regional]
The Hidden Hand — someone harvests drift-come with a bone-stone that finds you; the nurse & the kid were wagoned north out the Reach, and Maerwyn fears them unnamed
